name_cn:
Size: 18 x 11 x 10 cm
Top 1 bestseller! The long-awaited Utility Crossbody camera bag is finally here! Sourced from the original factory! There are many versions on the market, but we only share the best quality. Please compare carefully; every detail is anti-counterfeit! Can be worn crossbody for daily use, very versatile! Detach the strap to use as a small clutch! Suitable for men and women, a trendy all-in showpiece!
